description: A vibrant expressionist landscape painting dominated by a large, golden-orange full moon set against a deep blue night sky. The sky occupies the upper half of the composition in rich blues with visible brushstrokes. Below, a thin purple-pink horizon line separates sky from land. The terrain consists of rolling hills or mountains in warm yellow, gold, and peach tones, with a cluster of dark green trees or bushes in the lower right corner. The brushwork is bold and gestural, with saturated, unblended colors creating a vivid, almost dreamlike atmosphere.
